claim: The study uses a short evidence chain from identical images and faithful C0 baselines to paired conflict flips and boundary checks.
Only LLaVA-1.5-7B shows a clear primary C3/C4 false-colour alignment shift.
The LLaVA C3/C4 outputs are same-image faithful-to-conflict paired flips, not unpaired aggregate differences.
The observed shift is bounded by wording, answer format, colour route, and prompt factor.
